'''鈭歝h-d-th-d''' ('''kachadthedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:twitch|twitch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-d-th-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twitch|twitch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-d-th-d
|-
! Lemma
| kachadthedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichadthedoko|thichadthedoko]] || [[word:jichadthedoko|jichadthedoko]] || [[word:shichadthedoko|shichadthedoko]] || [[word:kichadthedoko|kichadthedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchadthedoko|thuthuchadthedoko]] || [[word:jujuchadthedoko|jujuchadthedoko]] || [[word:shushuchadthedoko|shushuchadthedoko]] || [[word:kukuchadthedoko|kukuchadthedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
